title: The Disappearance of Judy Smith

scenes.text: A woman vanished without a trace, leaving behind unanswered questions.
Judy Smith disappeared from San Francisco in 2010, sparking widespread concern.
Judy's last known sighting was near a popular bar, but surveillance footage showed no sign of her leaving.
Family and friends continue to search for answers but remain without leads.
scenes.label: FAMILY STILL SEARCHING

scenes.text: Follow if you can't stop asking why.

description: 📍 San Francisco, USA - 2010. Judy Smith vanished without a trace after last being seen in a bar, and her case remains a chilling mystery. Follow for daily mysteries!
